legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.editorText: The website www.seamlier.fr is published by SEAMLIER.
legal.hostingText: The site is hosted by o2switch:
legal.ipText: All elements (logo, graphic charter, texts, business tools) are the exclusive property of Seamlier. Any reproduction is prohibited without prior agreement.
legal.dataProtectionText: Seamlier only collects data necessary for connecting users and managing projects (measurements, contacts). In accordance with the law, you have the right to access and delete your data by writing to: contact@seamlier.fr.
legal.moreInfo: For more information about how we process your data, please see our

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy describes how SEAMLIER collects, uses and protects your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the French Data Protection Act.
privacy.dataCollectedIntro: We only collect data strictly necessary to provide our premium local tailoring services:
privacy.identificationText: First name, last name, email address, phone number.
privacy.dataClientsText: Body measurements, project history, messages exchanged with tailors.
privacy.connectionDataText: IP address, browser type, connection date and time.
privacy.purposesIntro: Your personal data is processed for the following purposes:
privacy.purpose1: Creation and management of your user account.
privacy.purpose2: Direct connection between individuals and tailoring professionals.
privacy.purpose3: Management of business tools (measurement tracking and projects).
privacy.legalBasisText: The processing of your data is based on the execution of the contract (for the provision of our marketplace services) and on your explicit consent collected when creating your account.
privacy.recipientsIntro: Your personal data is never sold to third parties. It is only shared with:
privacy.recipient1: The tailor or client concerned in the context of a connection.
privacy.recipient2: Our technical provider for website hosting (o2switch).
privacy.retentionText: Your data is kept for the duration of your registration on the platform. You can request its complete deletion at any time.
privacy.rightsText: In accordance with GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, portability and erasure of your data. To exercise these rights, contact us at:
privacy.securityText: We implement appropriate technical measures (SSL encryption) to protect your data against unauthorized access, particularly for the protection of your body measurement data.
privacy.copyright: © SEAMLIER – The art of local and simplified tailoring.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.objectText: These Terms and Conditions govern the use of the Seamlier platform, a premium marketplace dedicated to local tailoring, and define the conditions for connecting and completing projects between Clients and Professional Tailors.
terms.role: 2. Role of Seamlier: The Trusted Third Party
terms.roleIntro: Unlike a simple directory, Seamlier is actively committed to the success of each project:
terms.selectionText: Seamlier selects tailors admitted to the platform according to professionalism and expertise criteria.
terms.supportText: The platform provides business tools (measurement management, project tracking) to secure each stage of the order.
terms.guaranteeText: In case of difficulty with quality or deadlines, Seamlier intervenes as a mediator to ensure that the final result meets the Client's expectations and the brand's standards of excellence.
terms.precisionText: Seamlier's business tool allows the Client to submit their measurements.
terms.validationText: The project is considered launched once the Tailor has validated the technical feasibility via Seamlier messaging.
terms.transparencyText: Prices are set by Tailors. Seamlier ensures the clarity of quotes before any work begins.
terms.securePayText: Payments made through the platform are secure and guarantee the reservation of the service.
terms.withdrawal: 5. Right of Withdrawal and Custom-Made Specifics
terms.withdrawalText: In accordance with the law (Art. L221-28), the right of withdrawal does not apply to clearly personalized products or products made according to Client specifications (custom-made and specific alterations). However, Seamlier commits to finding an amicable solution if the result does not match the initial project.
terms.responsibilityText: Seamlier is responsible for the reliability of its platform and connections. Although the technical execution of tailoring is performed by the professional, Seamlier remains the guarantor of compliance with the "Seamlier" quality charter.
terms.disputesText: Any problem must be reported to contact@seamlier.fr. Seamlier commits to processing each complaint within 48 hours to guarantee a premium experience without hassle.
terms.copyright: © SEAMLIER – Excellence in local tailoring, peace of mind.
